About

I’ll look forward to the Southern Baptists leading the push for sensible gun control… “When we say our “thoughts and prayers” are with them, we are not washing our hands of duty” —R. Albert Mohler, Jr.

11 Nov 2017

“it tells your neighbors and your children that your religious convictions are always secondary to your partisanship” —Ross Douthat

11 Nov 2017

Does the combover hide the lobotomy scar? “President Trump said on Saturday that he believed President Vladimir V. Putin was sincere in his denials of interference in the 2016 presidential elections…”

11 Nov 2017

“If you find yourself excusing child molestation, then you are driven not by morality or faith, but simply by the emptiest kind of tribalism.” —Nicholas Kristof

10 Nov 2017

“This bill does little or nothing for the middle class, and even among the affluent it’s biased against those who work hard in favor of the idle rich.” —Paul Krugman

09 Nov 2017

Swift enums are the absolute best. Using them for drop location tracking in deep hierarchies makes it easy. Sum types for the win.

09 Nov 2017

The Omni Show debuts. I’m on a podcast.

08 Nov 2017

Darrin Bell on compromising.

06 Nov 2017

Western Conference Final tickets procured. Beat Houston. Up the Sounders. Up ECS. #ebfg

05 Nov 2017

Ballots are due Tuesday, Seattle! “Vote in every race on your ballot! It’s our right and our responsibility.” —Progressive Voter’s Guide

05 Nov 2017

“The future of the Western democratic project is the fundamental issue of our era.” —Michael Tomasky

30 Oct 2017

“Let’s put it the other way around: Kind words and gentle feelings are being used to absolve bad performance and lack of creativity.” —Jean-Louis Gassée

29 Oct 2017

. @SwiftxNW was a great conference. Smart, friendly people and I learned something cool from every talk.

Slides and code for my Swift by Northwest talk today.

“And the best way to show Trump that people are serious about impeaching him is to put the message on television.” —Michelle Goldberg

23 Oct 2017

“Trump has brought us to the brink of nuclear war, obstructed justice, and taken money from foreign governments.” — Tom Steyer

23 Oct 2017

At Herkimer Coffee polishing my @SwiftxNW talk. I’m super excited about the talk, but that might be the four shots of espresso talking.

22 Oct 2017

“The opposite message — that life is hard and unfair, that what is not necessarily your fault may yet be your problem, that you must act and bear responsibility for your actions — is what conservatism used to offer… ” —Kevin D. Williamson
